meta.title: Proactive OT Cyber Maintenance Practices
meta.description:
Marty Edwards on S4x22 Stage 3 makes the case for being proactive with your OT cyber maintenance. All too often the OT maintenance strategy is run to fail. He describes passive and active ways to gather information to help make those proactive OT cyber maintenance decisions.

Tenable was a S4x22 Partner and this was from their takeover of Stage 3 on the second day of the event.
